posts.text: The Cesar Chavez news is not a manufactured distraction and to call it so invalidates the traumas that survivors go through. #cesarchavez #survivors #protectwomen #protectchildren #believewomen

EVERY MINUTE a person is SAed in the US; and every 9 mins that someone is a CHILD. So believing victims shouldn’t even be that hard bc there are SO MANY. #cesarchavez #believewomen #protectwomen #protectchildren #survivors

I gave them fair warning but I guess they either don’t know the limits of their own lack of intellect, or they are just proving that men are dangerous. Luckily I don’t live in a binary world, and know it’s probably both and more. #cesarchavez #protectwomen #protectchildren #pdf #comments

The reason I made this is bc men will blame little girls and call them liars. Well it happens to us too. Are you going to ask me what I was wearing? What I did to ask for it? Why I didn’t leave? Why I allowed it to happen? Why I didn’t pursue legal action when I can’t even talk about it in a >3 mins video without having a full on panic attack. It’s 2026. Believe women. Believe girls. Believe victims. Protect children. #cesarchavez #survivor #protectchildren #pdf #protectwomen

2026 and we have 2 Notzis meeting in the White House as Japan’s PM Sanae Takaichi literally bends the knee as Trump jokes about Americans being kxlled in Pearl Harbor. #sanaetakaichi #fdt #japan #wwii #pearlharbor

Disclaimer: this is for entertainment purposes only 😬 but like wouldn’t that be funny if graffiti writers forced the government to change streets and park names away from a 🍇ist and PDF and changed it to the real heroes of the movement - Dolores Huerta or Larry Itliong’s name? And again… theoretically. #cesarchavez #graffiti #larryitliong #graffitiwriter #doloreshuerta

Most evil is derived from a deep insecurity that makes people crave power bc they think it will fix their insecurity. And they want this power so much that they will manufacture situations that makes them feel powerful but in reality, they put someone down… which is just another form of being insecure. #cesarchavez #pdf #fdt #protectchildren #protectwomen

Justice for Anna Murguia, Debra Rojas, Dolores Huerta, and all his other victims who never got a chance to tell their story. If you can support Cesar Chavez after this, then your hard drives need to be examined. #cesarchavez #annamurguia #debrarojas #doloreshuerta #protectchildren

Help set a world record AND eat Pad Thai?! SOLD! See you at the 17th Annual Thai New Year Festival in Thai Town, Los Angeles on Sunday, April 26th! #thainewyear #thainewyearfestival #padthai #worldrecord #losangeles

I don’t know what these “allegations” are going to be, but I figured now is a good time to remind everyone that Cesar Chavez was a rxcyst who if he were alive today would probably be out wearing a mask and kxdnxpping immigrants off the streets. #cesarchavez #larryitliong #doloreshuerta #filipino #union
